profile.avatarTypeError.en: File must be JPG, PNG, GIF, or WEBP.
profile.avatarTypeError.id: File harus berupa gambar JPG, PNG, GIF, atau WEBP.

profile.avatarDimError.en: Image dimensions could not be read.

pembelian.emptyHint.en: Receipts and purchase notifications will appear here.
pembelian.emptyHint.id: Struk dan notifikasi pembelian akan muncul di sini.

settings.accountSubtitle.en: Manage notification preferences and your account information.
settings.accountSubtitle.id: Kelola preferensi notifikasi dan informasi akun Anda.

settings.currentPasswordHint.en: Required to change username or password.
settings.currentPasswordHint.id: Wajib diisi untuk mengganti username atau password.

settings.newPasswordHint.en: Leave blank if you don't want to change password.
settings.newPasswordHint.id: Kosongkan jika tidak ingin mengganti password.

settings.systemSubtitle.en: Configure thresholds, model weights, and email connection parameters.
settings.systemSubtitle.id: Konfigurasi threshold, bobot model, dan parameter koneksi email.

settings.activeEmailHint.en: Settings opened from this mailbox dashboard.
settings.activeEmailHint.id: Pengaturan sedang dibuka dari dashboard mailbox ini.

settings.mailboxDomainHint.en: Company domain used by this mailbox.
settings.mailboxDomainHint.id: Domain perusahaan yang dipakai mailbox ini.

settings.accessAccountHint.en: Mailbox uses credentials managed by administrator.
settings.accessAccountHint.id: Mailbox menggunakan kredensial yang dikelola administrator.

settings.notifEmailHint.en: Get notified when incoming emails are quarantined
settings.notifEmailHint.id: Dapatkan pemberitahuan saat ada email masuk dikarantina

settings.footerNote.en: System settings can only be changed by Admin and Super Admin.
settings.footerNote.id: Pengaturan sistem hanya dapat diubah oleh Admin dan Super Admin.

settings.thresholdHint.en: Score ≥ Quarantine → QUARANTINE | Score ≥ Warn → WARN | Lower score → CLEAN
settings.thresholdHint.id: Skor ≥ Karantina → QUARANTINE | Skor ≥ Peringatan → WARN | Skor lebih rendah → CLEAN

settings.protectedDomainsHint.en: The following domains will be monitored for lookalike/typosquatting attacks.
settings.protectedDomainsHint.id: Domain-domain berikut akan dimonitor untuk serangan lookalike/typosquatting.

settings.whitelistSendersHint.en: Emails from senders on this list will not be quarantined (excluded from filter).
settings.whitelistSendersHint.id: Email dari pengirim di daftar ini tidak akan dikarantina (dikecualikan dari filter).

settings.adminNotifEmailHint.en: Alert sent to this address when a threat is detected
settings.adminNotifEmailHint.id: Alert dikirim ke alamat ini saat ada ancaman

settings.quarantineRetentionHint.en: Quarantined emails automatically deleted after N days
settings.quarantineRetentionHint.id: Email karantina dihapus otomatis setelah N hari

settings.superadminHint.en: Manage users, security policies, and other system-level configuration.
settings.superadminHint.id: Kelola pengguna, kebijakan keamanan, dan konfigurasi tingkat sistem lainnya.

settings.adminPanelHint.en: Manage users, reports, and system activity
settings.adminPanelHint.id: Kelola user, laporan, dan aktivitas sistem

msg.settings.quarantineGtWarn.en: Quarantine threshold must be greater than warn threshold.
msg.settings.quarantineGtWarn.id: Ambang karantina harus lebih besar dari ambang peringatan.

msg.settings.resetConfirm.en: Reset all settings to default values? Unsaved changes will be lost.
msg.settings.resetConfirm.id: Reset semua pengaturan ke nilai default? Perubahan yang belum disimpan akan hilang.

msg.settings.accountPasswordRequired.en: Enter current password to save account changes.
msg.settings.accountPasswordRequired.id: Masukkan password saat ini untuk menyimpan perubahan akun.

msg.settings.accountPasswordMismatch.en: New password confirmation does not match.
